    var ajax = new XMLHttpRequest();
    ajax.open('GET', "https://assets.quizlet.com/_next/static/media/icons.7932d1d4.svg");
    ajax.send();
    ajax.onload = function () {
      if (ajax.status === 404) {
        return Rollbar.error('Error fetching SVG sprite sheet (not found)');
      } else if (ajax.status !== 200) {
        // Sample these warnings, because errors spike when scraping traffic is happening.
        if (Math.random() <= WARNING_SAMPLE_RATE) {
          return Rollbar.warning('Error fetching SVG sprite sheet (bad response)', { code: ajax.status });
        }
      }
      var div = document.createElement('div');
      div.style.position = 'absolute';
      div.style.width = '0';
      div.style.height = '0';
      div.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      div.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      div.innerHTML = ajax.responseText;
      var waitForBody = setInterval(function() {
        if (document.body) {
          clearInterval(waitForBody);
          document.body.insertBefore(div, document.body.childNodes[0]);
        }
      }, 10);
    };
  }

(function() {
  function setBodyThemeClass(theme) {
    document.body.className = document.body.className.replace(/theme-(default|night)/g, '');
    document.body.className += ' theme-' + theme;
  }
  if (typeof window.matchMedia === 'function') {
    var mql = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)');
    setBodyThemeClass(mql.matches ? 'night' : 'default');
  }
})();
</script><div class="site"><link rel="preload" as="image" href="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSrsc_qVMlB6Hu6f_XRe0Edc5WkZcS7094EmE-viAmhKPfbw=s96-c?sz=150" class="shp6ady"><div class="sroqzxt" style="--sroqzxt-0:0rem"><div class="s1i6il9r" style="--s1i6il9r-0:40% minmax(0, 1fr)"><div class="sm8axow" data-testid="set-page-term-card-side"><div class="s1fbb24p"><div class="sxtdjbp hnjn0lb"><span class="TermText notranslate lang-en">are supposed to do sth</span></div></div></div><div class="sm8axow" data-testid="set-page-term-card-side"><div class="s1fbb24p"><div class="h5swuer hnjn0lb"><span class="TermText notranslate lang-en">used to say what someone should or should not do, especially because of rules or what someone in authority has said:<br/> We&#x27;re supposed to check out of the hotel by 11 o&#x27;clock.<br/> I&#x27;m not supposed to tell anyone.<br/> What time are you supposed to be there?</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div aria-label="Term" class="SetPageTermsList-term"><div class="shp6ady"><div class="sroqzxt" style="--sroqzxt-0:0rem"><div class="s1i6il9r" style="--s1i6il9r-0:40% minmax(0, 1fr)"><div class="sm8axow" data-testid="set-page-term-card-side"><div class="s1fbb24p"><div class="sxtdjbp hnjn0lb"><span class="TermText notranslate lang-en">be meant to do sth</span></div></div></div><div class="sm8axow" data-testid="set-page-term-card-side"><div class="s1fbb24p"><div class="h5swuer hnjn0lb"><span class="TermText notranslate lang-en">if you are meant to do something, you should do it, especially because someone has told you to or because you are responsible for it:<br/> Come on, Ellen, you&#x27;re meant to be helping me.<br/> I thought the police were meant to protect people.</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div aria-label="Term" class="SetPageTermsList-term"><div class="shp6ady"><div class="sroqzxt" style="--sroqzxt-0:0rem"><div class="s1i6il9r" style="--s1i6il9r-0:40% minmax(0, 1fr)"><div class="sm8axow" data-testid="set-page-term-card-side"><div class="s1fbb24p"><div class="sxtdjbp hnjn0lb"><span class="TermText notranslate lang-en">thank God/ goodness/ heavens</span></div></div></div><div class="sm8axow" data-testid="set-page-term-card-side"><div class="s1fbb24p"><div class="h5swuer hnjn0lb"><span class="TermText notranslate lang-en">used to show that you are very glad about something:<br/> Thank God that&#x27;s over! I&#x27;ve never been so nervous in my life!<br/>thank for<br/> &#x27;Only ten miles to go.&#x27; &#x27;Thank heavens for that!&#x27;</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div aria-label="Term" class="SetPageTermsList-term"><div class="shp6ady"><div class="sroqzxt" style="--sroqzxt-0:0rem"><div class="s1i6il9r" style="--s1i6il9r-0:40% minmax(0, 1fr)"><div class="sm8axow" data-testid="set-page-term-card-side"><div class="s1fbb24p"><div class="sxtdjbp hnjn0lb"><span class="TermText notranslate lang-en">don&#x27;t ask me</span></div></div></div><div class="sm8axow"       function genEventId() {
        if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && crypto.randomUUID) {
          return crypto.randomUUID();
        }
        return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function (c) {
          var r = (Math.random() * 16) | 0;
          var v = c === 'x' ? r : (r & 0x3) | 0x8;
          return v.toString(16);
        });
      }
      function normalizeKetchConsentStatus(status) {
        return status === 'granted';
      }
      function readKetchConsentFromCookie() {
        var cookiePrefix = '_ketch_consent_v1_=';
        var cookies = document.cookie ? document.cookie.split('; ') : [];
        for (var i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
          if (cookies[i].indexOf(cookiePrefix) !== 0) continue;
          try {
            var cookieValue = decodeURIComponent(cookies[i].slice(cookiePrefix.length));
            var json = JSON.parse(atob(cookieValue));
            return {
              advertising_cookies: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
                json.advertising_cookies && json.advertising_cookies.status
              ),
              analytics: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
                json.analytics && json.analytics.status
              ),
            };
          } catch (e) {
            return { advertising_cookies: false, analytics: false };
          }
        }
        return { advertising_cookies: false, analytics: false };
      }
      function extractKetchConsentForDataLayer(consent) {
        var purposes = consent && (consent.purposes || consent);
        return {
          advertising_cookies: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
            purposes && purposes.advertising_cookies && purposes.advertising_cookies.status
          ),
          analytics: normalizeKetchConsentStatus(
            purposes && purposes.analytics && purposes.analytics.status
          ),
        };
      }
      function registerKetchConsentListener() {
        if (typeof window.ketch !== 'function') return;
        window.ketch('on', 'consent', function(consent) {
          window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
          window.dataLayer.push(Object.assign(
            { event: 'ketch_consent_update' },
            extractKetchConsentForDataLayer(consent)
          ));
        });
      }
